name: Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 3-4 large basil leaves, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss together the diced tomato, salt, basil, and 3 tablespoons of olive oil.
2. When the bread is toasted, rub each slice with a whole garlic clove for a mild flavor.
3. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the top of the toasted bread.
4. Drizzle additional olive oil over the bread without saturating it.
5. Place the bread slices on a cookie sheet.
6. Set the oven to broil and place the cookie sheet under the heat until the bread is golden brown. Do not turn the bread over.
